docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUENTES, JULIAN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PUENTES, JULIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRISTI, KELLY $823.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $853.00, FOR RETURN OF DEPOSIT OFFSET BY 11 DAYS OF RENT. PLAINTIFF SUBSTANTIATED HIS RIGHT TO RETURN OF THE DEPOSIT OTHERWISE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KRISTI, KELLY
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUENTES, JULIAN AS TO DEFENDANT KRISTI, KELLY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DECEMBER 21, 2015 - APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, EXHIBITS BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT DETAINED BY THE COURT. TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DECEMBER 21, 2015 BY JPT DAVID LAVINE / JEAN MILEFF, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DECEMBER 21, 2015 - APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, NO EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. HEARING HELD AND MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DECEMBER 21, 2015 BY JPT DAVID LAVINE / JEAN MILEFF, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KRISTI, KELLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PUENTES, JULIAN DEFENDANT DID NOT SUPPORT HER CLAIM APART FROM BEING OWED 11 DAYS ADDITIONAL RENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
